"children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In maropost go to settings & tools > all settings & tools > custom scripts."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": Page)\"."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Copy and paste the below code into this window:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Script including shipping in revenue total:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "[%SHOW_ORDER id:'[@ORDER_ID@]'%]"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "[%PARAM *header%]"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "<script>"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "window.uetq = window.uetq || [];"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": [{"text": "Script not including shipping in revenue total:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "[%SHOW_ORDER id:'[@ORDER_ID@]'%]"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "[%PARAM *header%]"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "<script>"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "window.uetq = window.uetq || [];"}]},
